caption: Visiting the LARGEST Mall on the East Coast of America -📍The American Dream Mall in East Rutherford NJ #nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

geo_locations: The American Dream Mall in East Rutherford NJ
pinned_places: The American Dream Mall in East Rutherford NJ

transcription.text: I visited the American Dream Mall from New York City, and this is probably one of the coolest places I've ever seen in my life. And the best part? It's only a 30-minute bus ride from Times Square, so this is perfect for a day trip. Okay, let's get into it. Some of the coolest things I saw starting with Nickelodeon Universe, I could not believe there was a full-blown amusement park with roller coasters inside of a mall. And right next to it, there's a place called DreamWorks, which is the biggest indoor water park in North America. And this place has 15 water slides, a whole beach, and an ocean with a wave maker. There's also this massive ferris wheel that takes you up and over top of New York City with crazy views of the skyline. And if that's not ridiculous enough, there's a full-on ski mountain inside of the building. The mall is so massive that it has over 450 stores and more than 100 restaurants. So here's some of the foods that I enjoyed starting with the Mr. Beast Burger, which was actually juicy and delicious. A whole lobster with mussels, clams, and shrimp for only $35. Chocolate chip s'mores cookie from Bang Cookies, which was insane. And this amazing Hot Cheetos Mott's Dog from Ugly Donuts. Let me just say that this is only scratching the surface and this mall is honestly amazing. And even if you just came here to walk around and check it out without spending any money, you'll still have an absolute blast. Follow for more fun New York City travel adventures.
